name: katana
description: Agent-driven kanban workflow for AI coding agents. Decomposes work into product docs → epics → user stories → two-pass tasks (scaffold high-pass + fill-in low-pass), with templates, validation gates, and a phase-machine workflow runtime. Provides an MCP server for create/read/edit/list/search/transition/validate/decompose operations on a `.katana/` workspace, plus a CLI `katana board` for kanban rendering and `katana install <platform>` for installing into Claude Code, Cursor, or OpenAI/Codex-style agent surfaces.
